channel.title: Browser-Extension on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Browser-Extension on Arrans github.io

item.title: lanedirt/AliasVault
item.description: A self-hostable, end-to-end encrypted password manager with a built-in alias generator and email server.

item.title: gorhill/uBlock
item.description: uBlock Origin - An efficient blocker for Chromium and Firefox. Fast and lean.
